FSFHap preFilterSites (full): filterSnpsByTag -> het-deviation -> biallelic -> LD

Source: R/RcppExports.R
fsfhap_prefilter_sites_cpp.Rd

Faithful port of BiparentalHaplotypeFinder.preFilterSites. Step 1 = fsfhap_filter_snps_by_tag_cpp() with (minMaf, 1 - minCoverage, 1.0). On the result: (2) drop sites whose het fraction exceeds mean + maxHetDeviation * sd (sample sd over the filtered sites); (3) drop monomorphic (non-biallelic) sites; (4) if minR2 > 0, drop sites whose average r^2 over a ±50-filtered-site window (hets→missing, calc_rsqr) is < minR2 (NaN pairs skipped; all-NaN average is not a rejection, matching TASSEL's NaN < minR2 = false).

Usage

fsfhap_prefilter_sites_cpp(
  G,
  pos,
  min_maf,
  min_coverage,
  max_het_deviation,
  min_r2
)

Arguments

G

Integer matrix, taxa x sites, canonical g in 0,1,2,3; one chromosome.

pos

Integer marker positions (bp), length = ncol(G).

min_maf, min_coverage, max_het_deviation, min_r2

TASSEL fields (0.05 / 0.2 / 5 / 0.2).

Value

Logical vector, length = ncol(G): TRUE = site kept by preFilterSites.

On this page

Developed by Fausto Rodriguez Zapata.
